content: Use the uploaded reference image as the exact facial identity reference. Create an ultra-realistic outdoor glamour portrait with the exact same body proportions, camera angle, lighting style, and facial expression as the provided image, but change the {argument name="pose" default="pose so both hands are placed behind the head, gently holding the hair"}. Match the new pose precisely: {argument name="positioning" default="kneeling on the star-shaped pavement, upper body leaning slightly forward toward the camera, shoulders relaxed, elbows lifted outward, both hands behind the head with fingers softly holding the ponytail/hair, chest naturally forward, neck elongated, head tilted slightly upward toward the camera"}. Keep the same top-down perspective and full upper-body framing. The subject is a {argument name="subject description" default="beautiful young woman with a slim feminine figure, same body size and natural proportions as the reference image"}, realistic anatomy, elegant posture, soft curves, delicate shoulders, graceful legs, and natural proportions. Long brown hair styled in a high ponytail with loose natural strands, realistic texture, soft shine, natural movement. Clear glowing skin with visible pores, subtle freckles, warm blush, naturally shaped brows, delicate lashes, expressive hazel-green eyes, soft lips, and lifelike facial symmetry. Facial expression must match exactly: eyes looking directly upward into the camera with a calm intimate gaze, eyebrows naturally relaxed, cheeks softly defined, lips gently closed with a subtle neutral pout, jaw relaxed, chin slightly raised. Expression should feel soft, confident, feminine, effortlessly alluring, and naturally candid. She is wearing a fitted blue ribbed mini dress with off-shoulder ruffle neckline and long sleeves, body-contouring fit, realistic knit texture, natural folds, elegant silhouette. Gold layered necklaces, small hoop earrings, rings on fingers, and delicate jewelry details. Keep exact clothing fit, proportions, accessories, and styling. Background is a luxury city sidewalk with terrazzo star pavement, soft golden-hour sunlight streaks across the ground, realistic urban outdoor atmosphere, clean composition, elegant lifestyle setting. Keep the environment realistic and detailed. Lighting must match exact real natural golden-hour daylight from the provided image: warm sunlight from the side/top angle, glowing highlights on skin, hair, and dress, long soft shadows across the pavement, balanced exposure, authentic sunset tones, no harsh flash, no artificial studio light. Keep the exact real outdoor candid atmosphere. Include highly detailed skin texture, realistic hair strands, cinematic depth, DSLR-quality sharpness, true-to-life colors, fashion lifestyle photography style, 8k resolution, ultra photorealistic, hyper realistic quality.

content:
Ultra photorealistic {argument name="brand style" default="Nike-caliber campaign image"} of the same woman as reference, transformed into a mythological warrior-athlete mid-punch. Extreme worm’s-eye angle from near ground level, tilted upward, creating exaggerated scale and dominance. Her front glove explodes toward the lens in forced perspective, partially out of frame, creating a powerful depth and impact effect.

Body twisted in full kinetic rotation rear foot driving, hips engaged, core tight, shoulder snapping forward. Dynamic asymmetry, no static pose. Expression sharp, focused, predatory.

{argument name="outfit" default="Liquid chrome silver boxing set (sports bra + sculpted shorts)"}, brushed metal + mercury reflections + subtle iridescence, embossed laurel and Greek key details, minimal gold accents. Matching metallic gloves with slight deformation on impact.

Skin realistic with visible pores and natural sweat sheen catching light on shoulders and face. Cleopatra sharp wing eyeliner, strong brows, neutral lips. Tight braided high ponytail.

STRICT: keep exact face, identity, bone structure from reference.

Background unchanged.

Cinematic directional light, warm highlights, cool shadows, deep contrast, high micro-detail on metal and skin, subtle film grain.

Sony A1, 85mm f/1.4, f/1.6, ISO100, 1/200s, shallow depth, razor focus on eyes, 4K.

Negative: no face change, no plastic skin, no extra limbs, no distortion, no fake glow, no flat lighting, no cartoon, no logo.

content:
Subject: image1 - use the uploaded photo as the exact face reference (100% facial accuracy). Do not change facial features, proportions, skin texture, or expression. Keep my natural dark facial tone, no extra brightness or whitening.

(Use face reference exactly.)

A dreamlike, movie-quality augmented-reality street scene. I am {argument name="pose" default="leaning casually against a streetlight on an Indian city street, wearing an open yellow hoodie, black jeans, and white sneakers, holding a phone and looking at its screen"}.

Around me, multiple floating Spotify/Apple-Music style player cards orbit in full 3D space. Some cards appear in front, partially overlapping my body, while others float behind and beside me at varying depths. The UI cards have rounded corners, slight perspective tilt, translucent frosted-glass look, soft glowing edges, playback bars, and album art featuring songs by {argument name="artist" default="[Artist Name]"}.

Lighting is {argument name="lighting" default="cool-to-neutral with preserved shadows, subtle cinematic bloom, and natural interaction between Ul glow and street lighting"}. Foreground cards are sharp; distant cards softly blurred for depth. Medium-high contrast, realistic motion accents.

Photorealistic subject, central composition, seamless blend of real environment and AR visuals.

content:
Use the provided source image as the sole identity reference. Preserve the subject’s facial features, likeness, and recognizability with high fidelity.
Recompose the image into a tight close-up or upper-body editorial crop, ensuring the face dominates the frame. Disregard the original framing entirely.
Transform the portrait into a high-fashion gestural ink illustration. The visual style must be driven by bold, expressive black brushwork rather than fine or delicate sketch lines.
Apply the following stylistic elements:
Very thick, heavy black brush strokes as the primary structure
Broad dry-brush sweeps with visible texture
Large, asymmetrical black ink masses shaping the composition
Long, loose, calligraphic strokes for dynamic flow
Broken and incomplete contours
Scratchy, energetic secondary linework for detail accents
Strong black-on-ivory contrast
Smooth, minimal, monochrome skin rendering
Ensure the thick brush strokes dominate the image. Avoid clean, polished, or softly illustrated aesthetics. The result should feel raw, expressive, and painterly—like it was created with a heavily loaded brush and finished with sharp, confident pen marks.
Maintain a stylish, high-fashion editorial tone.
Include one hero accessory: {argument name="accessory" default="oversized translucent tinted sunglasses"}. The accent color {argument name="accent color" default="[ACCENT_COLOR]"} must be primarily expressed within this accessory, especially as a bold luminous tint in the lenses.
Allow only minimal, subtle traces of the same accent color elsewhere in the composition.
Keep the background clean, minimal, and unobtrusive.
Do not include any text, typography, or poster-style elements.

content: A young male model in his {argument name="age range" default="mid-20s"} stands centered in a deliberately posed medium shot, his body angled in a 45-degree turn with his weight evenly distributed and shoulders remarkably level. He wears classic menswear embodying an old money aesthetic, featuring a rich {argument name="jacket color" default="navy blue"} zip-up knit jacket layered over a dark turtleneck, sharply contrasted by crisp white trousers. His medium-length, swept-back brown hair reveals natural, fine flyaways, complementing a serious, sophisticated expression as his face turns strictly in profile to look away toward the right frame with relaxed eyebrows and a neutral, unsmiling mouth. His arms are elegantly crossed at chest level; the left hand rests softly on his right bicep with relaxed fingers curving gently over the arm and the thumb slightly separated, exposing a silver dress watch with a dark strap on his wrist. He stands isolated on a solid grey concrete street next to a dominant, pristine black SUV in the right midground, which features a canvas top, a taillight, and a hard-covered spare tire. A pristine silver hatchback is parked in the left midground, framing the urban street scene before dropping into a deep, slightly blurred background of an aged classical building facade. This weathered, matte stone wall reveals patchy light beige and warm grey tones, highly detailed with vertical structural lines, stone pillars, horizontal moldings, and recessed arched windows with dark panes. The atmosphere of urban elegance and relaxed wealth is bathed in soft, diffused natural outdoor daylight pouring from a single large overhead source, creating a cool, desaturated, high-contrast aesthetic. Short, gray shadows with soft gradual edges fall perfectly under his chin, beneath his crossed arms, and along the right side of the black SUV, while crisp, preserved highlights gleam beautifully on his hair, the bridge of his nose, the metallic watch dial, and the glossy curved paint of the vehicle. Captured as a photorealistic, tack-sharp digital fashion editorial portrait straight on from chest height, the image utilizes an {argument name="lens" default="85mm"} lens at f/2.8 and ISO 100 for a medium depth of field with absolutely zero grain, finished with subtle cool color grading, desaturated background tones, and enhanced contrast on the clothing, all elegantly framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

No text, no logos, no branding, no product packaging, no watermark.
